extraction_reasoning: The litigation summary separates matters filed by (“By”) from matters against the entities: I counted only the “Against” rows. In the table, criminal proceedings against the company, directors, promoters, KMPs, SMPs and subsidiaries are all Nil (0); statutory/regulatory proceedings against the company (5), promoters (1) and subsidiaries (10) total 16, while tax proceedings against the company (4) and subsidiaries (Nil) total 4; the “By” rows were excluded, and the detailed product-quality proceedings were not added to the summary-table counts. The quantified aggregate amount against the company and subsidiaries is 20.78 million plus 33.55 million = 54.33 million, excluding all “By” amounts, which converts to ₹5.433 crore; the source tables use ₹ million. The contingent-liabilities figure is the explicitly stated consolidated Total of ₹19.02 million as of September 30, 2025, converted to ₹1.902 crore rather than re-summing it. The customer concentration figures are disclosed only by business segment (Branded Generic Formulations and CDMO), not company-wide; therefore top-five and top-ten company-wide revenue percentages are not reported, although the segment tables use fiscal-year revenue from operations as their denominator.
